a.xlink:title: Indicates if exec_policy corresponds to an accelerator.
Fills cells_nb_material with the number of materials of environment env_id.
Initializes the instance. The instance is not usable until this method has been called.
Indicates if the instance is associated with an accelerator.
Sets the block size based on the command.
Transforme des mailles entre pure et partielle.
Fills items with the list of all MatVarIndex from the cells of view.
Fills cells_is_partial indicating if the cell is partial for environment env_id.
Fills cells_do_transform indicating if the cell transitions from pure to partial.
Fills the constituents affected by a modification.
Indicates if the creation of RunCommand for this instance is allowed from multiple threads.
Adds the cells of an environment material.
Calculates the cells to transform for material \at mat.
